decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_m100-ace (M100 local Manhattan). Same base_record_id is the closest match; no other M100 record exists in registry.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M100 and M101 buses operate rather infrequently.

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_m101 (M101 local Manhattan). Same base_record_id is the closest match; no other M101 record exists in registry.

evidence_refs.source_quote: M100 and M101 buses operate rather infrequently.

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_m2-ace (M2 local Manhattan). Same base_record_id is the closest match; no other M2 record exists in registry.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Slow boarding/disembarking of disabled/wheelchair and elderly passengers delay buses at stops (particularly a problem on the M2 around Adam Clayton Powell Boulevard).

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_125th-st-m60 (M60 local Manhattan). route_125th-laguardia-sbs is M60-SBS, a different service variant (SBS vs local); per do_not_merge_pairs principle different variants never merge. Base record is the correct local M60 identity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Bus bunching is an issue. It occurs often on the M60 (during the AM peak period)

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_m103-segment-speed (M103 Local Manhattan). Same base_record_id is the closest match; no other M103 record exists in registry.

evidence_refs.source_quote: The M103 duplicates route of other buses on 125th Street and contributes to the congestions.

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_125th-st-m35 (M35 local Manhattan). Same base_record_id is the closest match; no other M35 record exists in registry.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Disorderly conduct and slow movement of passengers boarding and disembarking the bus (cited on the M35).

decisions.rationale: Observation already resolves to route_125th-st-m15 (M15 local Manhattan). Other M15 records (route_m15-sbs, route_m15-limited-2010-06-09, route_m15-local-2010-09-14, route_m15-local-limited) are different service variants separated by do_not_merge_pairs. Base record is correct local M15 identity.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Connecting to bus routes operating on 125th Street from the M15 is an inconvenience.
